tasks.title: Phase 1: SessionStore Interface for Horizontal Scaling
Phase 3: Tasks Primitive for Agent Communication
Rev Phase 0: Protocol version negotiation layer
tasks.description: Add protocol.SupportedVersions (ordered). Parse client protocolVersion in handleInitialize (mcp.go:746); negotiate/echo; UnsupportedProtocolVersion when none overlap. Stop hard-returning protocol.MCPVersion (server.go:278).

tasks.title: Rev Phase 0: Capture client capabilities at initialize
tasks.description: Parse capabilities from initialize params into ClientCapabilities (session.go:37) so elicitation/sampling gating works.

tasks.title: Rev Phase 0: Inject Session into request context (stdio/http/ws)
tasks.description: Wire ContextWithSession from transports so SessionFromContext(ctx) is non-nil; unblocks sampling, elicitation, channels, logging notifications.

tasks.title: Rev Phase 0: Wire dead methods into dispatcher
tasks.description: Add completion/complete, logging/setLevel, resources/templates/list, notifications/initialized to methodHandlers() (mcp.go:672). Advertise completions capability.

tasks.title: Rev Phase 0: Unify Content into ContentBlock union
tasks.description: Replace duplicated Content structs (sampling.go:24, prompt.go:9, tool.go:16) with one ContentBlock union. Prereq for audio/resource_link/embedded.

tasks.title: Rev Phase 0: Per-revision conformance test harness
tasks.description: Table-driven suite driving a server through each revision's method set over each transport; the per-phase certification gate.

tasks.title: Rev Phase 1: Certify 2025-03-26 (v1.23.0)
tasks.description: Streamable HTTP server (single endpoint, Mcp-Session-Id, GET SSE), audio content, JSON-RPC batching (version-gated), OAuth 2.1 posture, ProgressNotification.message. Bump negotiated default.

tasks.title: Rev Phase 2: Certify 2025-06-18 (v1.24.0)
tasks.description: Reject batching (reversal), enforce MCP-Protocol-Version header, resource_link content, top-level title fields, completion context, RFC 9728/8707 auth metadata. Bump default.

tasks.title: Rev Phase 3: Certify 2025-11-25 = current (v1.25.0)
tasks.description: Wire Tasks to tasks/* JSON-RPC, sampling-with-tools, icons, URL-mode elicitation, JSON Schema 2020-12 default, input-validation-as-tool-error, enum/default rework, OIDC discovery. Bump default — mcp-go now current.

tasks.title: Rev Phase 4: 2026-07-28 RC stateless rewrite (v2.0.0)
tasks.description: server/discover, MRTR/InputRequiredResult with resultType, subscriptions/listen, drop Mcp-Session-Id, Mcp-Method/Mcp-Name headers, CacheableResult (ttlMs/cacheScope), W3C trace context, extensions capability map, MCP Apps + Tasks as extensions, error renumbering, deprecate roots/sampling/logging. Behind Stateless opt-in until spec final.
